title: Fix category table in admin (links, buttons, count display)
description: Improve the Admin Category management UI. Fix broken navigation links, style edit/delete buttons, and display the new product count field from the API.
acceptance_criteria: Category list table shows 'Products' count column using data from backend
Links to edit individual categories are functional
Actions buttons (edit, delete) follow project UI/UX standards
Navigation from categories to filtered product list (if applicable) works
